sn26.2:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, the arising, continuation, production, and manifestation of forms … of sounds … of odours … of tastes … of tactile objects … of mental phenomena is the arising of suffering, the continuation of disease, the manifestation of aging-and-death.
sn26.2:1.2: "The cessation, subsiding, and passing away of forms … of mental phenomena is the cessation of suffering, the subsiding of disease, the passing away of aging-and-death."
